calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Off Calendar

Defendant Topa Insurance Company'S Motion To Transfer(Change Of Venue)
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Topa Insurance Company's Motion To Transfer (Change Of Venue) - Defendants' motion to transfer claims against AFA and Topa ("Insurance Defendants") to Los Angeles County is granted. Plaintiff's objections to the declaration are overruled. Sessions declaration of personal knowledge is a sufficient foundation. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ajr

* * * No appearance on this matter. JOINDER OF DEFENDANT AFA CLAIM SERVICES, INC. IN TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY IS GRANTED. Plaintiff's objections to the declaration are overruled. Sessions declaration of personal knowledge is a sufficient foundation. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ajr * * * Clerical error not included in the calendar, but have moving papers.

Defendant Isaiah Jeffries'S Motion To Sever
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Isaiah Jeffries's Motion To Sever is granted. (See Royal Globe Ins. Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1979) 23 Cal.3d 880, 891 [suing an insured for negligence and the insurer in the same lawsuit "obviously violate[s] both the letter and spirit of Evidence Code section 1155"].) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ajr

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer(Change Of Venue)
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Transfer(Change Of Venue) is continued on the Court's own motion to January 14, 2105. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Sever
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ISAIAH JEFFRIES'S Motion To Sever is continued on the Court's own motion to January 14, 2105. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
